---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div class="resume-wrap">

<div class="resume-header">
<div class="resume-name">Brandon Theriault</div>
<div class="resume-contact">
Seattle, WA &nbsp;·&nbsp;
<a href="mailto:b5theriault@gmail.com">b5theriault@gmail.com</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/b5theriault" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/b5theriault</a>
</div>
</div>

<p style="font-size: 0.92rem; color: #333; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
Strategic People Research Scientist and AI integration leader with 12+ years of experience transforming workforce data into actionable commercial strategies. Expert in scaling advanced analytics, LLM workflows, and human-centered design across highly complex, matrixed environments to drive business-critical decisions. Proven track record of owning enterprise-wide platforms, advising cross-functional leadership, and delivering millions in cost savings for workforces of 1M+ employees.
</p>

---

<p class="resume-section">Professional Experience</p>

<div class="resume-role">
  <span><span class="resume-role-company">Block, Inc.</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="resume-role-title">Senior People Research Scientist</span></span>
  <span class="resume-role-dates">August 2024 – Present &nbsp;·&nbsp; Seattle, WA</span>
</div>
<p class="resume-role-context">Square, Cash App, TIDAL, and Afterpay · 13,000+ employees · 10+ live production deployments</p>

- **Scope of Ownership:** Direct ownership of enterprise-wide analytics platforms and major HR architecture redesigns. Completely revamped Block's job architecture — analysed 10,425 employees across 1,058 job codes to propose a unified Specialist/Generalist/Associate framework. Built the Elevate Matching Algorithm v4.0, generating 1,140 mentorship matches across 100+ skill dimensions with 98.3% sponsor coverage and a 95% reduction in processing time.
- **Platforms & Infrastructure:** Architect of "Feedback Fusion," an NLP engine processing 121,000+ records with 96.4% sentiment accuracy. Reduced query latency by 95% (12 hours → 52 minutes) via Snowflake/PostgreSQL pipeline automation and CTE batch processing. Built a company-wide activity dataset integrating 13,138 employees across 71 dimensions and six AI tools.
- **Predictive Modelling:** Engineered high-precision models including XGBoost (0.985 AUC) for promotion forecasting and causal inference analysis for specialised workforce retention — identifying a critical "tenure cliff" and delivering a 500% ROI. Built a Sales AE Commitment Score analysing 1,067 Account Executives, quantifying a 49% performance gap between quartiles.
- **Cross-Functional Influence:** Strategic advisor to Talent Acquisition, HR Ops, Sales, and Executive Leadership. AI integration leadership delivered $67K+ in cost savings and 1,300+ hours in efficiency gains. Designed organisational influence maps using a 6-factor scoring algorithm across 10,000+ employees to identify succession risks and high-impact ICs.
- **Open Source:** Creator and maintainer of [gooseR](https://github.com/b5theriault/gooseR){target="_blank"} (CRAN) — an R package bridging AI assistants with R development environments, reducing AI-assisted coding friction by 10–20× via intelligent caching and sub-100ms streaming latency.

<div class="resume-role" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <span><span class="resume-role-company">Amazon.com, Inc.</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="resume-role-title">Senior Research Scientist</span></span>
  <span class="resume-role-dates">October 2017 – July 2023 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Seattle, WA</span>
</div>
<p class="resume-role-context">Promoted from Research Scientist (February 2015 – October 2017) · 1M+ employees globally</p>

- **Scope of Ownership:** Managed a cross-functional team of 8 researchers specialising in AI/ML applications and advanced people analytics. Owned research enabling AWS Infrastructure expansion from 3 to 80 sites in 6 months. Co-architected Amazon Connections, a daily pulse survey platform reaching 500,000+ frontline employees.
- **Cross-Functional Influence:** Directly influenced VP-level strategic decisions on workforce planning, employee engagement, and talent placement across highly complex global logistics and tech environments.
- **Commercial Impact:** Launched the U.S. Frontline Associate Exit Survey & Dashboard, reducing turnover by 15% and generating $10M in annual savings. Developed a preference-based placement algorithm using a Random Forest ML model trained on heuristics-based surveys and process-path performance metrics, decreasing early attrition by 20%. Improved hiring efficiency by 30% through predictive workforce planning models.

<div class="resume-role" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <span><span class="resume-role-company">SAP Inc.</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="resume-role-title">Global HR Early Talent Team</span></span>
  <span class="resume-role-dates">August 2011 – January 2015 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Newtown Square, PA</span>
</div>
<p class="resume-role-context">PMO, HRBP, and Research Analyst capacities · 4 Canadian business units · 500+ employees</p>

- Selected for the high-potential Global HR Early Talent program, partnering directly with company leaders across functions.
- Led global research that streamlined organisational restructuring, reducing process time by 80% ($2M annual savings).
- Tracked metrics and lead projects to increase diversity representation through targeted workforce analytics projects. Orchestrated company-wide People & Diversity Week for 50,000+ participants.
---

<p class="resume-section">Technical Skills &amp; Open Source</p>

<div class="resume-skills-grid">
<div class="resume-skills-row"><strong>Programming</strong> R (Expert · CRAN Maintainer), Python (Advanced), SQL, Snowflake, PostgreSQL</div>
<div class="resume-skills-row"><strong>Platforms</strong> Git/GitHub, AWS, Qualtrics, Tableau, Power BI, Jira</div>
<div class="resume-skills-row"><strong>ML Methods</strong> XGBoost, Random Forest, CatBoost, Neural Networks, K-NN, Clustering</div>
<div class="resume-skills-row"><strong>Stats Methods</strong> Causal Inference, Psychometrics, SEM, IRT, Factor Analysis, Survival Analysis</div>
<div class="resume-skills-row"><strong>Research</strong> Experimental Design, A/B Testing, Survey Design, NLP, Predictive Modelling</div>
<div class="resume-skills-row"><strong>Visualisation</strong> ggplot2, Plotly, D3.js, Shiny, Tableau, Adobe Creative Suite</div>
</div>

<p style="margin-top: 1.25rem; font-size: 0.88rem;">
**gooseR** (CRAN) &nbsp;·&nbsp; Creator & Maintainer &nbsp;·&nbsp; [github.com/b5theriault/gooseR](https://github.com/b5theriault/gooseR){target="_blank"}
R package bridging AI assistants with R development environments. Persistent memory management, session tracking, bulk operations, and markdown rendering for AI output. 20,000+ potential users.
</p>

---

<p class="resume-section">Education</p>

<div class="resume-edu-entry">
<strong>Master of Science — Industrial-Organisational Psychology</strong>
<span>West Chester University, West Chester, PA &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2012</span>
<span>Thesis: <em>Virtual Teamwork: Optimising Remote Collaboration in Global Organisations</em></span>
</div>

<div class="resume-edu-entry" style="margin-top: 0.75rem;">
<strong>Bachelor of Science — Behavioral Psychology</strong>
<span>Western Michigan University, Kalamazoo, MI &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2009 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Lee Honors College</span>
<span>Minor: Human Resource Management</span>
</div>

</div>
